column3:
Go to the application form

http://testdoaj.cottagelabs.com//en/apply
Skip to section 2 (About) using the progress bar
In the "Other organisation's name" field, enter the value "None"
Click "Next" at the bottom of the page

column4: There is an error by the "Other organisation's name" field that says the value is not permitted

column3: Skip to section 4 (Editorial) using the progress bar
Select "Other" from the Peer Review checkboxes
In the "Other peer review" field, enter the value "None"
Click "Next" at the bottom of the page

column4: There is an error by the "Other peer review" field that says the value is not permitted

column3: Go back to the "Other peer review" field and change the text value to "blind peer review" and click Next
Click "Next" at the bottom of the page

column4: There is an error by the "Other peer review" field that asks you to use a structured option instead

column3: Skip to section 6 (Best practice) using the progress bar
Select "A National Library" and "Other" from the Archiving services checkboxes
Enter "None" in both boxes that appear
Select "Other" from the Repository policy checkboxes
Enter "None" in the "Other repository policy" field
Select "Other" from the Persistent identifier checkboxes
Click "Next" at the bottom of the page

column4: There is an error by all relevant fields that says the value is not permitted
